verStmt.version: v1: Edited, anonymised dataset for public distribution
verStmt.notes: Version 1 was downloaded from Stats SA in November 2024.

stdyInfo.abstract: The DTS is a large-scale household survey aimed at collecting accurate statistics on the travel behaviour and expenditure of South African residents travelling within the borders of the country. Such information is crucial when determining the contribution of tourism to the South African economy, as well as helping with planning, marketing, policy formulation, and the regulation of tourism-related activities.

sumDscr.geogUnit: The lowest level of geographic aggregation covered by the data is municipality.
sumDscr.universe: The target population of the survey consists of all private households in all nine provinces of South Africa and residents in workers’ hostels. The survey does not cover other collective living quarters such as students’ hostels, oldage homes, hospitals, prisons and military barracks, and is therefore only representative of non-institutionalised and non-military persons or households in South Africa.

stdyInfo.notes: The following information was collected: Domestic day and overnight trips undertaken; trips undertaken by respondents and trips by other household members without the respondent accompanying them; the profile of the most recent day/overnight domestic trips undertaken both by the respondent and other household members (detailing information on destination, trip length, purpose of visit, accommodation, transport, activities, trip expenditure, etc.) and socio-demographic information.

dataColl.sampProc:
The sample design for the DTS 2022 was based on a Master Sample (MS) that has been designed for all household surveys conducted by Statistics South Africa.
The Master Sample used a two-staged, stratified design with probability-proportional-to-size (PPS) sampling of PSUs from within strata, and systematic sampling of dwelling units (DUs) from the sampled primary sampling units (PSUs). A self-weighting design at provincial level was used. Stratification was done in two stages: Primary stratification was defined by metropolitan and non-metropolitan geographic area type. During secondary stratification, the Census 2011 data were summarised at PSU level. The following variables were used for secondary stratification: household size, education, occupancy status, gender, industry and income.
dataColl.weight: Sampling weights are constructed for the 12 reference months. These included both full sample and replicate weights for each of the 12 reference months. The full sample and replicate weights are calibrated using the population control totals for the cells defined by the cross-classification Age-Group x Population-Group x Gender at the national level, and broad Age Groups at the province level.

useStmt.citReq: Statistics South Africa. Domestic Tourism Survey 2022 [dataset]. Version 1. Pretoria: Statistics South Africa [producer], 2024. Cape Town: DataFirst [distributor], 2024. DOI: https://doi.org/10.25828/s6n4-5534
useStmt.conditions: Public access data for use under a Creative Commons CC-BY (Attribution-only) License

catgry.labl: 1. Legally married (include customary, traditional, religious, etc.)
2. Living together like husband and wife
6. Single, but have lived together with someone as husband/wife before
7. Single and have never been married/never lived together as husband/wife before
3. Not working: looking for a job
4. Not working: not looking for a job
3. Yes, less than 40km not for leisure
4. No, did not travel at all

var.name: Q12WHYNODAY
var.labl: Why were no day trips taken

catgry.labl: 1. No family/ friends to visit somewhere else
3. Too expensive/ I would rather spend money on something else
11. No reason to undertake a trip
11. City of Cape Town Metropolitan Municipality
53. Dr Ruth Segomotsi Mompati District Municipality

var.name: Q25APLACE
var.labl: Name of the main place visited Purpose of trip

var.name: Q213TOTC
var.labl: Total incurred whilst on the trip

var.name: Q214TRIPDECISION__6
var.labl: Family (e.g cousins/Aunts/Partner and children over 18 years)

var.name: Q214TRIPDECISION__11
var.labl: I had no part in the destination decision-making/beyond my control

var.name: Q215DECIDE
var.labl: How long did it take to make decision

var.name: Q216cWHERE__1
var.labl: Friend and relative where you live

var.name: Q216cWHERE__2
var.labl: Friend and relative in the place you visited

catgry.labl: 6. Family (e.g cousins/ aunts/ uncles/ spouse/ partner and children over 18 years)
11. I had no part in the destination decision making/ beyond my control

var.name: Q220METHD
var.labl: What method was used to book

catgry.labl: 1. Fully inclusive package (i.e. transport, accommodation, shopping, coach tours, food and beverages)
2. Full package (i.e. transport, accommodation, car hire, food and beverages)
3. Package (i.e. transport, accommodation and car hire but not food)
4. Independent arrangement/ no package (e.g. transport, accommodation, car hire, coach tours and food were each booked separately)

var.name: Q225PLANACTIVITY__1
var.labl: Adventure e.g. bungee jumping, scuba diving, white water rafting,hiking

var.name: Q225PLANACTIVITY__2
var.labl: Beach e.g. surfing, sunbathing, and swimming

var.name: Q225PLANACTIVITY__3
var.labl: Business e.g. conference, convention, visiting clients

var.name: Q225PLANACTIVITY__4
var.labl: Cultural historical and heritage e.g. cultural village, museums, art gallery, to

var.name: Q225PLANACTIVITY__6
var.labl: Health e.g. hydro, spa, beauty centre, health farms

var.name: Q225PLANACTIVITY__8
var.labl: Medical e.g. treatment in a clinic/hospital

var.name: Q225PLANACTIVITY__10
var.labl: Eating out e.g. restaurants and bars

var.name: Q225PLANACTIVITY__12
var.labl: Shopping e.g. malls, flea/craft markets and purchasing

var.name: Q225PLANACTIVITY__13
var.labl: Socializing e.g. spending time with people indoors or outdoors (e.g. picnics, ba

var.name: Q225PLANACTIVITY__14
var.labl: Sporting - attended a sporting event as a spectator

var.name: Q225PLANACTIVITY__15
var.labl: Sporting - competed in a sporting event

var.name: Q225PLANACTIVITY__16
var.labl: Theme parks e.g. aquariums, amusement parks

var.name: Q225PLANACTIVITY__17
var.labl: Trading e.g. bought goods from suppliers or sold goods to customers

var.name: Q225PLANACTIVITY__19
var.labl: Visiting natural attractions e.g. scenic drives, parks, dams, river, mountains

var.name: Q225PLANACTIVITY__20
var.labl: Widlife e.g. game viewing in a nature reserve, whale watching

var.name: Q226ACTIVITIES__1
var.labl: Adventure e.g. bungee jumping, scuba diving, white water rafting, hiking

var.name: Q226ACTIVITIES__2
var.labl: Beach e.g. surfing, sunbathing, and swimming

var.labl: Socializing e.g. spending time with people indoors or outdoors (e.g. picnics, ba

var.name: Q226ACTIVITIES__14
var.labl: Sporting - attended a sporting event as a spectator

var.name: Q226ACTIVITIES__15

var.name: Q226ACTIVITIES__16
var.labl: Theme parks e.g. aquariums, amusement parks

var.name: Q226ACTIVITIES__17

var.name: Q227PLANATTRA
var.labl: Attraction or landmark planned to visit

catgry.labl: Legally married (include customary, traditional, religious, etc.)
Living together like husband and wife
Single, but have lived together with someone as husband/wife before
Single and have never been married/never lived together as husband/wife before
Not working: looking for a job
Not working: not looking for a job
Yes,40 KM and more any purpose)
Yes, less than 40 km for leisure
Yes, less than 40 km not for leisure
No, did not travel at all

var.name: Q32WHYNOVEN
var.labl: Why were no day trips taken

catgry.labl: No family/friends to visist somewhere else
Too expensive/I would rather spend money on something else
No reason to undertake a trip

var.name: Q47TRANSP
var.labl: Main transport to reach the destination

var.name: Q413TOTC
var.labl: Total incurred whilst on the trip

var.name: Q414TRIPDECISION__6
var.labl: Family (e.g cousins/Aunts/Partner and children over 18 years)

var.name: Q414TRIPDECISION__11
var.labl: I had no part in the destination decision-making/beyond my control

var.name: Q415DECIDE
var.labl: How long did it take to make decision

var.name: Q416cWHERE__1
var.labl: Friend and relative where you live

var.name: Q416cWHERE__2
var.labl: Friend and relative in the place you visited

var.name: Q420METHD
var.labl: What method was used to book

var.name: Q425HOT
var.labl: Number of nights in a Hotel

var.name: Q425GUES
var.labl: Number of nights in a Guest House/ Guest Farm

var.name: Q425BB
var.labl: Number of nights in a Bed and Breakfast

var.name: Q425LOD
var.labl: Number of nights in a Lodge (e.g. Game lodge)

var.name: Q425SELF
var.labl: Number of nights in a Self-catering

var.name: Q425REL
var.labl: Number of nights at friends and relatives

var.name: Q425HOS
var.labl: Number of nights in a Hostel/Backpackers

var.name: Q425CAMP
var.labl: Number of nights in Campsite and Caravan

var.name: Q425HOSP
var.labl: Number of nights in a Hospital

var.name: Q425HALLS
var.labl: Number of nights in Halls (e.g. church, community or other halls)

var.name: Q425HOL
var.labl: Number of nights in a Holiday Home/ Second Home

var.name: Q425OTH
var.labl: Number of nights in other accommodation

var.name: Q426TOTAL
var.labl: People who went on a trip
